2604.10448.title: Instruction Data Selection via Answer Divergence
2604.10448.paper_summary: Instruction tuning relies on large instruction-response corpora whose quality and composition strongly affect downstream performance. We propose Answer Divergence-Guided Selection (ADG), which selects instruction data based on the geometric structure of multi-sample outputs. ADG draws several high-temperature generations per instruction, maps responses into an embedding space, and computes an output divergence score that jointly encodes dispersion magnitude and shape anisotropy. High scores correspond to instructions whose answers are both far apart and multi-modal, rather than clustered paraphrases along a single direction. Across two backbones and three public instruction pools, fine-tuning on only 10K ADG-selected examples consistently outperforms strong selectors on six benchmarks spanning reasoning, knowledge, and coding. Analyses further show that both dispersion magnitude and shape anisotropy are necessary, supporting answer divergence as a practical signal for instruction data selection. Code and appendix are included in the supplementary materials.
2604.10448.paper_summary_zh: 指令調整依賴於大型指令-回應語料庫，其質量和組成對下游性能有很大影響。<lb/>我們提出了答案差異引導選擇（ADG），該方法根據多樣本輸出的幾何結構選擇指令數據。<lb/>ADG 每個指令生成幾個高溫度的輸出，將回應映射到嵌入空間，並計算一個輸出差異分數，該分數共同編碼了分散程度和形狀各向異性。<lb/>高分數對應於那些答案既相距遙遠又是多模態的指令，而不是沿著單一方向聚集的同義改寫。<lb/>在兩個主幹網絡和三個公共指令池上，僅在 10K 個 ADG 選擇的範例上進行微調，始終在跨越推理、知識和編碼的六個基準上超越強大的選擇器。<lb/>分析進一步顯示，分散程度和形狀各向異性都是必要的，支持答案差異作為指令數據選擇的實用信號。<lb/>代碼和附錄包含在補充材料中。
2604.10448.author: Bo Li et.al.
2604.10448.authors: Bo Li, Mingda Wang, Shikun Zhang, Wei Ye
